name: service-now
description: Reads and writes ServiceNow incident, user, and group table data through the ServiceNow Table API.

risk.read: external ServiceNow API read of incident, user, and group table data
risk.write: creates incident/user/group records and updates their fields by sys_id (ServiceNow Table API PATCH, which modifies only submitted fields); creating/deactivating a user account is a higher-scrutiny mutation than incident/group create-update
risk.approval: none for incident/group create-update (low-risk ticketing/CRM-style data); review user create/update before enabling in a caller with untrusted input, since it can grant or revoke ServiceNow instance access
